topic.title: 현지 문화 및 관습 이해
topic.description: 이 콘텐츠는 외국인 여행객이 현지에서 식사할 때 겪을 수 있는 문화적 차이를 이해하고 적절한 예절을 배우는 데 도움을 줍니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 안녕하세요! 혹시 이 지역에서 식사할 때 기본적인 예절이 있을까요?
네, 몇 가지 있어요. 예를 들어, 식사 중에 손가락으로 가리키는 것은 실례라고 생각할 수 있습니다.
그렇군요. 그럼 식탁 위에서 팔꿈치를 올리는 것은 괜찮은가요?
일반적으로는 팔꿈치를 식탁에 올리는 것은 피하는 것이 좋습니다.
알겠습니다. 식사를 마치고 접시를 어떻게 처리해야 하는지도 궁금합니다.
식사를 마치면 접시를 옆으로 살짝 밀어두면 됩니다. 서버가 치워줄 거예요.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Hello! Are there any **basic etiquette** for dining in this area?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Hello! | Are there any basic etiquette | for dining in this area?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Yes, there are a few. For example, **pointing with your finger during meals** might be considered rude.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Yes, there are a few. | For example, | pointing with your finger during meals | might be considered rude.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: I see. Then is it okay to **put your elbows on the table**?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: I see. | Then is it okay | to put your elbows on the table?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Generally, it's better to avoid **placing your elbows on the table**.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Generally, | it's better to avoid | placing your elbows on the table.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Understood. I'm also curious about **what to do with the plate after finishing the meal**.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Understood. | I'm also curious about | what to do with the plate after finishing the meal.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Once you're done, **you can just push the plate slightly to the side.** The server will take it away.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Once you're done, | you can just push the plate slightly to the side. | The server will take it away.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Thank you so much! That was very helpful.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Thank you so much! | That was very helpful.

keyword_speeches.target_sentence: Hello! Are there any basic etiquette for dining in this area?
Yes, there are a few. For example, pointing with your finger during meals might be considered rude.
I see. Then is it okay to put your elbows on the table?
Generally, it's better to avoid placing your elbows on the table.
Understood. I'm also curious about what to do with the plate after finishing the meal.
Once you're done, you can just push the plate slightly to the side. The server will take it away.
Thank you so much! That was very helpful.
